title: Band of Undying
description: A small datapack that changes the Totem of Undying to a Band of Undying
body:
[Mr3DAlien.net](http://mr3dalien.net 'http://mr3dalien.net') **|** [Discord](http://discord.mr3dalien.net 'http://discord.mr3dalien.net') **|** [Alien-Packs](https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPacks') **|** [Partners](https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners 'https://linktr.ee/AlienPartners')
## Description

This Datapack modifies the Totem of Undying into a Band of Undying. The purpose of this Datapack is to eliminate the inconvenience of having the Totem of Undying equipped in your offhand. With the Band of Undying in your offhand, it will no longer be visible in first-person view.

# IMPORTANT PLEASE READ:
### Choose which Pack you want!
The **Primary/Default** one will replace the Totem of Undying with the **Band of Undying**

The **Secondary** one will make it that the Totem of Undying can be transformed into the **Band of Undying** by naming it into one of the following in an anvil:

- **Band of Undying**
- **Band der Unsterblichkeit**
- **Bond dea Unsterblichkeit**
- **Band vode Unsterblichkeit**
- **ƃuᴉʎpu∩ ɟo puɐq**
- **Anti-dyin' Band**
